brief: Sunday morning. You've got two things pulling at your attention — the Health Tech Nerds subscription renewal is due Wednesday, in 3 days, and Mia's field trip to the Discovery Museum is Monday, so a permission slip or packed lunch might be waiting. Take the day at whatever pace feels right; the humidity has opinions, but moving slowly through what matters most will serve you better than rushing. Carrying forward from yesterday, the Chime Card is still on its way, details still coming through.

theRead: The tax documentation is sitting in the near-window zone—not urgent yet, but worth having on your radar as the week unfolds. The Google Home renewal is also shadowing the same Wednesday deadline as Health Tech Nerds, so batching those together if they both come due could save you a mental task later.
pulse: The humidity has opinions today, you've got two things pulling at your attention, and your body's still finding its rhythm—a good day for moving slowly through what matters most.
conductorQuestion: The Anthony's Runway 84 reservation is in two weeks — still planning to go?
